EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IExportItemsParameters

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters for exporting items in a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("DB45460E-82A8-426F-90FE-67A8454101EF")]
public interface IExportItemsParameters

Properties

BaseName

The basename.

string BaseName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

BuildPyramids

Indicates whether pyramids are built for each raster dataset associated with each selected catalog item.

bool BuildPyramids { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellSize

The cellsize.

IPoint CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClippingGeometry

The clipping geometry.

IGeometry ClippingGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

ComputeStatistics

Indicates whether histogram statistics are computed for each raster dataset associated with each selected catalog item.

bool ComputeStatistics { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The extent.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

Format

The output format.

string Format { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

NoData

The nodata.

string NoData { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputFolder

The output folder.

string OutputFolder { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ResamplingType

The resampling type.

rstResamplingTypes ResamplingType { get; set; }

Property Value

rstResamplingTypes

Examples

Sample Snippet

SnapRaster

The reference raster whose bottom-left corner (XMin, YMin) is used for snapping the output raster's bottom-left corner.

IRaster SnapRaster { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialRef

The spatial reference.

ISpatialReference SpatialRef { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

The storagedef.

IRasterStorageDef StorageDef { get; set; }
